set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Strings var s = vars.xmlIn fun tag(name) = (s scan ('<' ++ name ++ '>([^<]*)'))[0][1] default '' --- { userId: tag('userId'), courseId: tag('courseId'), enrollmentId: tag('enrollmentId') }]
set-variable.doc:name: Parse XML simple

db:select.doc:name: Matrícula + nota
db:select.db:sql: SELECT e.id AS eid, e.user_id, e.course_id, e.status, er.grade, er.passed FROM enrollments e LEFT JOIN evaluation_results er ON er.enrollment_id = e.id WHERE e.id = :eid AND e.user_id = :uid

when.expression: #[sizeOf(payload default []) > 0 and payload[0].passed == true and (payload[0].grade default 0) >= 5]

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT certificate
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO certificates (id, enrollment_id, user_id, course_id, grade, certificate_payload) VALUES (:id, :eid, :uid, :cid, :grade, :payload)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.certId, eid: vars.row.eid, uid: vars.row.user_id, cid: vars.row.course_id, grade: vars.row.grade, payload: '<Certificate id="' ++ vars.certId ++ '"/>' }]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain var cid = vars.certId --- '<?xml version="1.0"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soap:Body><GenerarCertificadoResponse xmlns="http://mtis.local/cert"><certificateId>' ++ cid ++ '</certificateId><status>OK</status></GenerarCertificadoResponse></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>']
set-payload.doc:name: SOAP OK

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- '<?xml version="1.0"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soap:Body><soap:Fault><faultstring>No cumple requisitos (matrícula, nota aprobada)</faultstring></soap:Fault></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>']
set-payload.doc:name: SOAP Fault

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 var s = vars.xmlIn fun tag(name) = (s scan ('<' ++ name ++ '>([^<]*)'))[0][1] default '' --- tag('userId')]
set-variable.doc:name: userId consulta

db:select.doc:name: SELECT certificados
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, enrollment_id, course_id, grade, issued_at FROM certificates WHERE user_id = :uid ORDER BY issued_at DESC

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain var rows = payload default [] var inner = (rows map ((r) -> '<certificate><id>' ++ (r.id as String) ++ '</id><enrollmentId>' ++ (r.enrollment_id as String) ++ '</enrollmentId><courseId>' ++ (r.course_id as String) ++ '</courseId><grade>' ++ (r.grade as String) ++ '</grade></certificate>')) joinBy '' --- '<?xml version="1.0"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soap:Body><ConsultarCertificadoResponse xmlns="http://mtis.local/cert"><certificates>' ++ inner ++ '</certificates></ConsultarCertificadoResponse></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>']
set-payload.doc:name: XML lista certificados

db:insert.doc:name: Log sync legacy
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO legacy_sync_log (id, operation, status, detail) VALUES (:id, 'SYNC_REPO', 'OK', :detail)

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 var s = vars.xmlIn fun tag(name) = (s scan ('<' ++ name ++ '>([^<]*)'))[0][1] default '' --- { userId: tag('userId'), courseId: tag('courseId'), amount: tag('amount') }]
set-variable.doc:name: Parse compra

db:insert.doc:name: Pago PENDING
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO payments (id, user_id, course_id, amount, currency, status, external_ref) VALUES (:id, :uid, :cid, :amount, 'EUR', 'PENDING', :eref)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.payId, uid: vars.pur.userId, cid: vars.pur.courseId, amount: (vars.pur.amount default "0") as Number, eref: 'soap-purchase-' ++ vars.payId }]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain var pid = vars.payId --- '<?xml version="1.0"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soap:Body><IniciarCompraResponse xmlns="http://mtis.local/purchase"><paymentId>' ++ pid ++ '</paymentId><status>PENDING</status></IniciarCompraResponse></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>']
set-payload.doc:name: SOAP IniciarCompra

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 var s = vars.xmlIn fun tag(name) = (s scan ('<' ++ name ++ '>([^<]*)'))[0][1] default '' --- { paymentId: tag('paymentId'), userId: tag('userId'), courseId: tag('courseId') }]
set-variable.doc:name: Parse pago

db:update.doc:name: Confirmar pago
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE payments SET status='CONFIRMED', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=:id AND status='PENDING'

db:insert.doc:name: INSERT enrollment
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO enrollments (id, user_id, course_id, status) VALUES (:id, :uid, :cid, 'ACTIVE')
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: vars.eid, uid: vars.pc.userId, cid: vars.pc.courseId }]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output text/plain var e = vars.eid default '' --- '<?xml version="1.0"?><soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soap:Body><ConfirmarCompraResponse xmlns="http://mtis.local/purchase"><status>CONFIRMED</status><enrollmentId>' ++ e ++ '</enrollmentId></ConfirmarCompraResponse></soap:Body></soap:Envelope>']
set-payload.doc:name: SOAP confirmado

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 var s = vars.xmlIn fun tag(name) = (s scan ('<' ++ name ++ '>([^<]*)'))[0][1] default '' --- tag('paymentId')]

db:update.doc:name: Cancelar pago
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE payments SET status='CANCELLED', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=:id
